description: This class includes fishing on a commercial basis in inland waters, including the taking of freshwater crustaceans and molluscs, other freshwater aquatic animals and plants.
includes: fishing on a commercial basis in inland waters
taking of freshwater crustaceans and molluscs
service activities incidental to freshwater fishing
excludes: processing of fish on specialized vessels or on land, see 1020
fishing for sport or recreation and related service activities, see 9319
inspection and patrol and other fishery protection service activities, see 8423
